title: PixelPulse Pro
description: My everyday play pack that I use to record, stream and Just play with overall!
body:
PixelPulse Pro – Everyday Use is a streamer-friendly modpack tuned for smooth FPS, low stutter, and clear visuals so your gameplay looks great in recordings and live streams without heavy tweaking. It stays close to vanilla gameplay while adding quality-of-life tools and creator utilities, making it ideal for SMP sessions, YouTube series, or casual survival worlds that need a consistent, reliable environment.

This first release focuses on stability and ease of use: install it, join your world, and start recording or going live with a setup that is optimized for performance, readable HUDs, and simple camera or replay tools when you need them.
​
